name: Khajuraho Group of Monuments
description: A UNESCO World Heritage site world-renowned for its stunning Nagara-style architecture and exquisite erotic sculptures that celebrate the divine harmony of life.
history: Built by the Chandela dynasty between 950 and 1050 AD. Of the original 85 temples, 25 survive today, representing both Hindu and Jain faiths.
famousFor: Intricate erotic carvings and UNESCO World Heritage temples.
